/usr/bin/ar qc libpuremvc.a CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/core/controller.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/core/model.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/core/view.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/command/simple_command.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/command/macro_command.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/facade/facade.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/mediator/mediator.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/observer/notification.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/observer/notifier.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/observer/observer.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/patterns/proxy/proxy.c.o CMakeFiles/puremvc.dir/src/platform/posix/mutex.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libpuremvc.a
